problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Biomimetic. Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
